## Summary

Describe the problem and the implemented solution.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests or maintenance

## Compatibility

Describe any Top.gg v0/v1, Discord.js, Node.js, or public API impact.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm audit`
- [ ] Documentation and typings updated when required
- [ ] No credentials or private data included

## Additional context

Include screenshots, sanitized payloads, or migration notes when useful.
